title: E-Waste Management Learning Resource Flow
description: A flowchart showing the progression of suggested learning resources for understanding e-waste management, from foundational knowledge to advanced application.
elements: Official Reports & Data (e.g., UNEP, Basel Convention)
Documentaries & Visual Media (e.g., 'The Story of Electronics')
Interactive Tools (e.g., E-Waste Calculators, Recycling Locators)
relationships: Start with Official Reports for foundational data and definitions, then use Academic Journals to deepen theoretical understanding. Visual Media provides engaging context, leading to Interactive Tools for practical application. Finally, analyze Case Studies to synthesize knowledge and see real-world outcomes.
